name: Rice Roll
ingredients: Veg Oil, for brushing on the tray and chopping board
steps: Brush a thin layer of veg oil over the tray
Pour the mixture onto the tray
Put in to steam for a 30sec once it's slightly set
Take out and tilt the tray until it's evenly spread
Steam for another a minute until it's fully set
Take out the rice film gently onto an oiled surface
Roll and store in a container with baking sheet layers
Cling film to cover. Touching the rice roll
Store in fridge until service to reheat
